---
title: "Gödel Completeness Theorem"
---

::: {#thm-main-godel-completeness .theorem .goal name="Gödel completeness theorem" date="2026-07-12"}
For every first-order signature \(L\), every set \(\Gamma\) of \(L\)-sentences,
and every \(L\)-sentence \(\varphi\), if every \(L\)-structure satisfying
\(\Gamma\) also satisfies \(\varphi\), then \(\Gamma\vdash\varphi\) in the
proof calculus developed in this project.
:::
